Please see the FDA website for more information on unapproved drugs ( https://www.fda.gov/AboutFDA/Transparency/Basics/ucm213030.htm ) and the approval process ( https://www.fda.gov/Drugs/ResourcesForYou/Consumers/ucm054420.htm ).
